role_title: Senior Associate, New Verticals - Convenience Merchant Strategy & Operations

location.office_time_required: a few days a month in person together

level_signals: Individual contributor role reporting to a Manager

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have 2-4+ years of experience. You've succeeded in similar cultures that are highly analytical and cross-functional (whether in tech, operations, strategy, consulting, banking, or a related experience).
you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and building models in excel.
You let data win arguments, and you're comfortable pulling your own data in SQL and building models in excel.
You solve problems from first principles. You have a talent for synthesizing complex problems, can translate high-level goals into actionable plans, and enjoy implementing a process
You're entrepreneurial. You have a bias for action and are able to build things from the ground up.
You're unafraid of ambiguity. Rapid change and learning is exciting to you, and you thrive in ambiguous, startup environment
You're energized by AI tools — and you actively experiment with them. You don't wait to be told how to use a new tool; you're already exploring tools like Claude, Cursor, Gemini and more.
Lead, collaborate and Influence. You'll partner with and influence cross-functional teams including growth, quality, finance, product and engineering to launch initiatives to the finish line.
Own tracking dashboards and manage week over week metrics to drive high quality operations.
You have a completed Bachelor's Degree ideally in Economics, Business, Finance or a related business field.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: You have a completed Bachelor's Degree ideally in Economics, Business, Finance or a related business field.

scope.surface: Convenience vertical merchant strategy & operations — portfolio of major enterprise convenience banners
scope.business_model: marketplace / on-demand delivery, B2B2C (DoorDash platform connecting merchants and consumers)
core_responsibilities: Drive promotion strategy for merchant portfolio — determine promotion structures, occasions, and audiences
Enrich in-app experience by optimizing in-app merchandising across the funnel
Launch '0 to 1' initiatives — identify, validate, and act on highest impact growth opportunities
Own tracking dashboards and manage week-over-week metrics
Build models using Excel and SQL to evaluate economic, operational, and strategic costs and benefits
Use AI tools to automate manual processes, build prototypes, and develop product visions
Lead dedicated ownership over a portfolio of major enterprise banners

green_flags: Clear ownership area — named enterprise convenience merchant portfolio
Hybrid model with light in-office requirement (few days a month)
Comprehensive benefits package described in detail
Role is central to one of DoorDash's most profitable and high-MAU verticals
AI fluency treated as a differentiator and opportunity rather than threat — growth-oriented framing
red_flags: Visa sponsorship not mentioned — unclear for non-US-authorized candidates
No specific cities listed despite salary being location-adjusted — candidates may not know which offices are relevant
Broad years range (2-4+) combined with 'Senior Associate' title may indicate ambiguous leveling
AI tool expectations are relatively high for a strategy/ops role and could shift scope significantly over time

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from title, years range, and comp)

location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as false from hybrid framing and no remote mention)
ambiguities: Bachelor's degree bullet says 'ideally in Economics, Business, Finance' — the 'ideally' qualifier suggests the field of study is a nice-to-have, but the degree itself reads as required. Split accordingly.
Years range stated as '2-4+ years' — the '+' is ambiguous; treated as minimum 2, maximum 4 with openness to more.
Visa sponsorship not addressed anywhere in the JD — marked as 'unclear'.
No specific office cities named for this role despite pay being location-adjusted; cities_listed left empty.
